products.name: Premium Business Cards
products.tagline: Make a lasting first impression
products.description: Our premium business cards are crafted on 600gsm board with an optional silk or matte laminate finish. Available with gold or silver foil stamping, embossing, and spot UV for a truly distinguished look.

products.name: Luxury Letterhead & Envelopes
products.tagline: Professional stationery for your brand identity
products.description: Elevate your correspondence with our premium letterhead printed on 100gsm Conqueror or Laid paper. Matched envelopes available in DL and C5 formats with optional window panels.

products.name: Artisan Brochures
products.tagline: Bespoke print for visionary brands
products.description: From trifolds to saddle-stitched booklets, our brochures are finished with meticulous attention to detail. Choose from a curated range of paper stocks and bespoke finishing options.

products.name: Custom Branded Notebooks
products.tagline: Branded notebooks for your team
products.description: Hardcover A5 or A4 notebooks with your brand embossed or foil-stamped on the cover. Featuring premium 90gsm ruled or dotted inner pages, ribbon bookmark, and elastic closure.

products.name: Roll-Up Banners
products.tagline: Portable exhibition stands
products.description: Lightweight and portable 85 x 200cm roll-up banner displays with a premium aluminium base. Perfect for exhibitions, events, and retail environments. Includes a carry bag.

products.name: Luxury Packaging Boxes
products.tagline: Premium unboxing experience
products.description: Custom rigid gift boxes with magnetic closure, printed inside and out with optional gold or silver foil stamping. Perfect for retail, gifting, and premium product presentation.

products.name: Feather Flags & Banners
products.tagline: Premium outdoor event branding
products.description: High-impact feather and teardrop flags printed on dye-sublimated polyester with UV-resistant inks. Includes a ground spike, cross base, and water-fillable base for versatile use.

products.name: Exhibition Backdrop Display
products.tagline: Make your booth unforgettable
products.description: Full-colour printed fabric or vinyl backdrop displays for trade shows and exhibitions. Available in multiple sizes with a lightweight pop-up frame system for quick setup.

products.name: Branded Event Tent
products.tagline: Own your outdoor space
products.description: Custom-branded 3x3m or 6x3m pop-up gazebo tents with full-colour printed canopy and optional side walls. Perfect for outdoor events, markets, and promotions.

products.name: Outdoor Mesh Banner
products.tagline: High-impact large format display
products.description: Heavy-duty PVC mesh banners ideal for outdoor fencing, building wraps, and scaffolding. The mesh material allows wind to pass through while maintaining full visibility.

products.name: Corporate Stationery Set
products.tagline: Complete brand identity package
products.description: A complete corporate stationery suite including business cards, letterheads, compliment slips, and envelopes. All items designed with consistent branding for a unified professional identity.

products.name: Premium Metal Pens
products.tagline: Elegant engraved writing instruments
products.description: High-quality metal rollerball and ballpoint pens with laser engraved branding. Presented in individual velvet sleeves or premium gift boxes.

products.name: Branded USB Flash Drives
products.tagline: Practical tech gifting
products.description: Custom printed or engraved USB flash drives available in 16GB, 32GB, and 64GB capacities. Choose from metal, wood, or classic swivel designs.

products.name: Executive Gift Sets
products.tagline: The ultimate VIP presentation
products.description: Luxurious matching gift sets containing a premium notebook, engraved metal pen, power bank, and USB drive. All elegantly presented in a custom-branded rigid box.

products.name: Ceramic Coffee Mugs
products.tagline: Everyday brand visibility
products.description: Classic 11oz ceramic mugs with durable full-colour sublimation printing. Dishwasher and microwave safe for long-lasting daily use.

products.name: Custom Printed Lanyards
products.tagline: Essential event and office wear
products.description: High-quality 20mm flat polyester lanyards with full-colour dye sublimation printing on both sides. Includes a metal trigger clip and safety breakaway.

products.name: Custom Stickers & Labels
products.tagline: Brand every package
products.description: Premium die-cut stickers and roll labels. Available in matte, gloss, or clear finishes. Perfect for product packaging, sealing boxes, or promotional giveaways.

products.name: Promotional Flyers
products.tagline: Get your message out there
products.description: High-quality A5 or DL flyers printed on 170gsm silk paper. Vibrant full-colour printing to ensure your promotions stand out from the crowd.

products.name: Presentation Folders
products.tagline: Professional document delivery
products.description: Oversized A4 interlocking presentation folders printed on heavy 350gsm silk board. Includes business card slots and optional spot UV or foil highlights.

products.name: PVC ID Cards
products.tagline: Secure and professional identification
products.description: Durable CR80 PVC plastic cards ideal for employee IDs, membership cards, or loyalty programs. High-resolution edge-to-edge printing.

products.name: Custom Branded Notepads
products.tagline: Perfect desk accessory for everyday brand visibility
products.description: Customized brand notepads with premium 80gsm wood-free bond paper, perfect for notes, sketches, and letters. Glued at the top with a sturdy back cover.

products.name: Luxury Thank You Cards
products.tagline: Express gratitude with custom elegant prints
products.description: Show clients and guests your appreciation with stunning, heavy 350gsm thank you cards. Customized inside and out with matched luxury envelopes.

products.name: Premium Award Certificates
products.tagline: Commemorate achievements in style
products.description: Expertly printed award and appreciation certificates on fine linen paper. Add elegant gold foil borders for a professional corporate finish.

products.name: Desk & Wall Calendars
products.tagline: Stay top of mind all year round
products.description: High-quality, custom double-sided calendars in desk tent or wall configurations. Features premium ring binding and thick silk pages for excellent image clarity.
features: A4 Wall or A5 Tent Formats

products.name: Premium Hang Tags
products.tagline: Elegant tag branding for premium apparel and gifts
products.description: Custom product hang tags printed on premium art board with adjustable sizing and punch hole details. Perfect for boutique retail and premium product branding.

products.name: Product Catalogues & Booklets
products.tagline: Display your collection in brilliant detail
products.description: Multi-page stitched or bound booklets perfect for corporate profile delivery and retail catalogues. Clean folding and heavy cover stocks for durability.

products.name: Custom NCR Invoice Books
products.tagline: Professional receipting and billing
products.description: Duplicate or triplicate carbonless NCR books customized with your business information. Perforated for easy slip removal with thick backing cardboard.

products.name: Receipt & Payment Voucher Books
products.tagline: Keep track of payments securely
products.description: Premium receipt and payment voucher books with custom headers, colored slips, and secure bounding. Perfect for accounting departments.

products.name: Wax Seals & Custom Embossers
products.tagline: The royal seal for luxury branding
products.description: Engraved custom brass stamps for wax sealing or classic paper embossing. Gives an unmatched handcrafted quality finish to certificates and folders.

products.name: Self-Inking Rubber Stamps
products.tagline: Fast, crisp impressions for daily administration
products.description: Premium quality self-inking rubber stamps with replaceable ink pads. Heavy-duty construct ensures thousands of high-contrast, clean impressions.

products.name: Pocket & Desk Embossing Seals
products.tagline: Add official raised seals to key documents
products.description: Add raised three-dimensional seals to legal, official, or notary documents. Heavy-duty steel body designed for consistent print quality.

products.name: Die-Cut Vinyl Stickers
products.tagline: Thick premium stickers cut to custom shapes
products.description: Beautiful die-cut vinyl stickers contoured to your exact logo shape. Waterproof and scratch-resistant, perfect for notebooks, laptops, and outdoor packaging.

products.name: Print & Cut Sticker Sheets
products.tagline: Easy peel multi-sticker custom sheets
products.description: Multiple custom-shaped kiss-cut stickers printed on convenient A4 sheets. Easily peel and brand packaging, events, or product boxes.

products.name: Paper Stickers - Matte & Glossy
products.tagline: Cost-effective product labeling and packaging seals
products.description: High-quality, cost-effective paper stickers for indoor labeling. Strong adhesive backing in your choice of smooth matte or high-shine glossy finish.

products.name: Transparent Vinyl Stickers
products.tagline: Give products a premium, hand-labeled look
products.description: Stunning transparent labels printed with high-opacity inks. Perfect for clear glass, plastic jars, cosmetic bottles, and premium window displays.

products.name: Epoxy Domed Stickers
products.tagline: Stunning three-dimensional crystal resin badges
products.description: Add a thick layer of high-gloss polyurethane resin over your printed stickers to create durable, high-impact 3D badges. Perfect for appliances, keychains, and luxury items.

products.name: Metallic Foil Stickers
products.tagline: Elegant shiny foil stamps for award-winning details
products.description: Lustrous gold, silver, or bronze foil stamping on high-grade adhesive stock. Add luxury embossing details for product certificates, gift boxes, and special occasions.

products.name: Hologram Security Stickers
products.tagline: Tamper-evident holographic authenticity seals
products.description: Multi-dimensional holographic labels that reflect rainbow colors. Optional tamper-evident backing reveals 'VOID' patterns when peeled, protecting your brand assets.

products.name: Eco-friendly Kraft Paper Stickers
products.tagline: Organic earthy brown texture for eco-conscious packaging
products.description: Made from 100% recycled organic kraft fibers, these natural brown stickers offer a rustic, artisanal appearance that communicates high sustainability values.

products.name: Numbered Event Tickets & Coupons
products.tagline: Secure event tickets with custom numbering and stubs
products.description: Keep gate control secure with customizable tickets featuring sequential serial numbering and perforated stubs. Optional reflective security foil highlights available.

products.name: Custom Scratch & Win Cards
products.tagline: Engage customers with exciting retail scratch promotions
products.description: Maximize store engagement with custom silver or gold scratch panels. Full-color offset printing on high-density cards for absolute secrecy.

products.name: Table Tent Cards
products.tagline: Premium self-standing displays for menus and desk offers
products.description: Perfect self-standing tri-fold tent cards for hotel desks, restaurant tables, and reception lobbies. High gloss highlight laminations available.

products.name: Custom Paper Car Mats
products.tagline: Protect vehicle floors during servicing with custom mats
products.description: Heavy absorbent paper car floor mats designed specifically for automotive detailers and dealerships. Add your brand and custom checklist.

products.name: Printed Table Mats & Placemats
products.tagline: Add branding directly to food tables and trade desks
products.description: High resolution full color printed placemats in easy-to-dispose A3 paper or thick reusable wipeable PVC. Ideal for corporate dinners and themed cafe setups.

products.name: X-Frame Banner Displays
products.tagline: Ultra-lightweight, high-impact freestanding display banner
products.description: Lightweight X-shaped support frame with reinforced fiberglass backings. Highly portable banner system that folds into a small carrying case in seconds.

products.name: Outdoor Spring A-Board Signs
products.tagline: Wind-resistant street level pavement signage
products.description: Designed for maximum stability outside shopfronts. Features thick heavy springs that absorb gusting wind, double-sided snap frame, and a sand-fillable wheel base.

products.name: Toblerone Triangular Board Frames
products.tagline: 3-sided freestanding triangular advertising boards
products.description: Freestanding triangular corrugated plastic boards printed directly on each side. Highly visible from all directions, perfect for roadside promotion and crowd routing.

products.name: Life-size Cutout Standees
products.tagline: Staggering photographic resolution custom figure cutouts
products.description: Life-sized standees cut to the custom silhouette of people, mascots, or products. Printed directly onto thick rigid foam boards with a convenient folding rear easel.

products.name: Pop-Up Backdrop Displays
products.tagline: Classic exhibition magnetic trade show display stand
products.description: Premium expanding frame backdrop with custom-printed magnetic PVC panels. Includes halogen focus spotlights and a lockable rigid trolley case that converts to an exhibition counter.

products.name: Fabric Pop-Up Banners
products.tagline: Stunning tension fabric display wall with lightweight frames
products.description: Clean modern tension polyester fabric stretched smoothly over a lightweight snap-fold frame. Wrinkle-resistant graphic cover is fully machine washable for long-term use.

products.name: Indoor Fabric Backdrops
products.tagline: Non-reflective soft knit photogenic backdrops
products.description: Non-reflective soft-knit fabric prints, ideal for media steps, stage productions, and professional video backdrops. Certified fire-retardant mesh fibers.

products.name: Outdoor Tension Fabric Backdrops
products.tagline: Heavy-duty windproof large backdrop stands
products.description: Special mesh-lined fabric backdrops built on heavy weighted steel floor plates to survive gusty wind conditions. UV-resistant direct print ensures colors don't fade.

products.name: Media Step & Repeat Backdrops
products.tagline: The classic red carpet logo grid backdrop
products.description: Ideal press conference backdrop designed with high density logos arranged in an elegant repeating checkerboard pattern. Durable adjustable frame included.

products.name: Portable Promotion Tables
products.tagline: High durability counter table for active store brandings
products.description: Standard trade show promotion desk with internal shelving, custom vinyl wrap, and removable header boards. Folds entirely into a portable canvas carry bag.

products.name: Exhibition Counter Desks
products.tagline: Premium wooden-top corporate reception counters
products.description: Luxury lockable counters built with sturdy aluminum support structures and rich varnished wooden desktops. Custom graphic sheets wrap elegantly around the front.

products.name: Branded Outdoor Umbrellas
products.tagline: Premium canopy patio umbrellas with full print customization
products.description: Heavy-duty outdoor umbrellas for retail spaces, hotel pool decks, and cafes. Canopy is made of thick UV-resistant water repellent canvas fabric.

products.name: Custom Table Covers & Cloths
products.tagline: Premium washable tension tablecloths for trade desks
products.description: Convert plain exhibition tables into high-impact brand displays. Anti-wrinkle machine washable heavy polyester fabrics customized with your full-cover graphics.
features: Available in Fitted or Throw Styles

products.name: Giant Presentation Cheques
products.tagline: Make massive award announcements with oversized dry-erase checks
products.description: Oversized presentation checks printed directly onto thick 5mm PVC foam board. The high gloss dry-erase writing film layer allows you to fill details on the fly.

products.name: Custom Social Media Photo Frames
products.tagline: Engage party guests with custom photo prop borders
products.description: Fun die-cut selfie frames printed directly on rigid lightweight foam boards. Choose from Instagram, Facebook, or fully custom wedding templates.

products.name: Teardrop Advertising Flags
products.tagline: High visibility aerodynamic teardrop shape flag banners
products.description: Aerodynamic tear drop banners designed for active wind conditions. Dye-sublimated knitted mesh prevents fabric fraying and maintains color depth.

products.name: L-Shape Banner Flags
products.tagline: Sturdy rectangular advertising flags with max branding area
products.description: Right angled L-shape banners that maintain their shape and maximum readability even under completely windless indoor conditions. Heavy aluminum stand poles.

products.name: Blade Branding Flags
products.tagline: Sleek rectangular blade profile flags for modern events
products.description: Sleek, rectangular vertical blade flags. The pocket sleeve and carbon tension pole holds the banner fully flat, showing off logo elements perfectly.

products.name: Miniature Table Flags
products.tagline: Elegant table-sized flag stands for conference rooms and offices
products.description: Luxurious satin silk flags scaled perfectly for desk decor and conference setups. Mounted on high-gloss heavy chrome stand sticks.

products.name: Conference Table Flags
products.tagline: Premium multi-flag desk arrays for official boardrooms
products.description: Weighted heavy base multi-flag stands. Allows arrangement of two, three, or more flags on a single center block. Perfect for bilateral corporate summits.

products.name: Hanging Conference Flags
products.tagline: Elegant satin ceiling and wall hanging banner flags
products.description: Thick premium satin banners cut to pointed banner edges. Supported by a horizontal gold wood hanging rod and luxurious gold tassels.

products.name: Custom Hoisting Flags
products.tagline: Heavy-duty outdoor flags built for high-altitude hoisting poles
products.description: Made with double-knit mesh polyester threads to withstand severe weather. Includes heavy brass grommets, rust-proof D-clips, and reinforced hem stitches.

products.name: Wall Mounted Flagpoles & Flags
products.tagline: Storefront wall hanging flags with tangle-free poles
products.description: Rust-proof stainless steel mounting bracket with 45 or 90 degree pole inserts. Special tangle-free spinning rings prevent flag wrap around the bar.

products.name: Large Stadium Crowd Flags
products.tagline: Oversized featherlight crowd flags for high-impact celebrations
products.description: Ultra-lightweight mesh polyester flags scaled up to massive multi-meter footprints. Extremely safe, flame-retardant, and easy to wave over crowds.

products.name: Vibrant Festival Flags
products.tagline: Extra-high flutter banners with fluorescent color scales
products.description: Bright fluorescent wind flags that capture sunlight. Supported by extra flexible tall carbon composite poles that move elegantly in sync with light breezes.

products.name: Street Pole Flags
products.tagline: Secure direct clamp street pole lamp banners
products.description: Premium block-out heavy vinyl banners built to be clamped directly onto street light poles. Wind release crescent cuts prevent pole overload.

products.name: Promo Hand-held Flags
products.tagline: Economic high-volume handheld promo wave flags
products.description: Classic small waving flags on smooth plastic or wood poles. Ideal for sports supporters, national day celebrations, parades, and high-volume corporate giveaways.

products.name: Wearable Body Flags
products.tagline: Show brand colors on active supporter body capes
products.description: Wearable cape-style body flags with comfortable double arm sleeves and neck snaps. Soft machine washable polyester that breathes comfortably.

products.name: Custom Knit Fan Scarves
products.tagline: High luxury knit acrylic supporter scarves
products.description: Keep fans cozy with classic knitted acrylic supporter scarves. Double-sided jacquard knitting captures complex brand text and logos in complete detail.

products.name: Premium Flag Bases & Accessories
products.tagline: Heavy duty support bases for feather and sail flags
products.description: Essential steel support flag bases. Choose from heavy solid concrete rings (20kg), water fillable plastic shells (30L), or rotating cross frames.
features: Rotating Cross Base with Ground Spike

products.name: Premium PU Leather Organizers
products.tagline: Complete executive desk notebook and card organizer binder
products.description: Luxurious soft-grain PU leather organizer covers with built-in magnetic buckles, card slots, passport folds, and premium refillable six-ring A5 notebooks.

products.name: Custom Printed Mouse Pads
products.tagline: Keep brand imagery right under client mouse hands
products.description: Premium fabric topped desk mouse pads with thick natural non-slip rubber backing. Full-color dye sublimated prints look rich and never wear off.

products.name: Insulated Stainless Steel Bottles
products.tagline: Double-wall copper vacuum luxury drinkware bottles
products.description: Extremely premium 304 food-grade double-walled travel bottles. Keeps drinks ice cold for 24 hours or steaming hot for 12 hours. Laser engrave your branding.

products.name: Stainless Steel Tumblers
products.tagline: Double-walled spill-proof commuter tumblers
products.description: Car cup-holder friendly stainless steel commuter cups. Slide locking leakproof lids with heavy temperature retaining double-wall copper seals.

products.name: Branded Beverage Coasters
products.tagline: High density absorbent table coasters for office tables
products.description: Eco-friendly natural thick cork or padded leather board coasters. Scratch and heat resistant tops printed with rich vibrant corporate logotypes.

products.name: Premium Branded T-Shirts
products.tagline: Heavy ring-spun premium combed cotton brand apparel
products.description: Heavyweight premium cotton corporate uniforms and promo T-shirts. Combed ring-spun cotton feels incredibly soft and holds printing or embroidery beautifully.

products.name: Custom Sports Jerseys
products.tagline: Highly breathable mesh sublimation printed athletic jerseys
products.description: Perfect for company leagues and active events. Constructed with moisture-wicking quick-dry fabric. Full sublimated prints hold bright colors indefinitely.

products.name: Embroidered Snapback Caps
products.tagline: Sturdy six-panel cotton twill corporate custom caps
products.description: High crown heavy cotton twill caps with high resolution 3D embroidery threads. Features breathing eyelets and convenient adjustable rear snap buckles.

products.name: High-Visibility Safety Vests
products.tagline: Fully certified reflective corporate high-vis safety vests
products.description: EN ISO certified safety vests with double horizontal high-grade silver reflective tape bands. Heavy zipper fronts with convenient ID pocket slots.

products.name: Custom Embroidered Patches
products.tagline: Vibrant custom density embroidered patches for jackets and caps
products.description: Stunning heavy-thread embroidered badges customized with iron-on or Velcro backing. Overlocked marrow borders provide a durable retro apparel look.

products.name: Printed Paper Cups & Napkins
products.tagline: Food grade biodegradable branded event cups and table napkins
products.description: Food-safe double-walled thermal cups matched with super soft water-printed double-ply napkins. Custom logo print in non-toxic water-based inks.

products.name: Water Bottle Labels
products.tagline: Synthetic ice-bucket proof custom water bottle labels
products.description: 100% waterproof synthetic wrap-around labels designed specifically for water bottles. High adhesive properties survive ice bucket cooling water easily.

products.name: Event Tyvek & Silicone Wristbands
products.tagline: High security waterproof Tyvek and stretch silicone wristbands
products.description: Perfect event crowd organizer wristbands. Choose from tamper-evident fiber Tyvek with sequential numbering or stretchy 100% non-toxic silicone bands.

products.name: Luxury Crystal Trophies & Medals
products.tagline: Luxurious optical K9 crystal awards with velvet presentation cases
products.description: Commemorate executive victories with K9 optical glass award trophies. Features precision 3D internal laser etching. Custom ribbon medals also available.
features: Custom Ribbon Neck Straps for Medals

products.name: Custom Metal & Leather Keychains
products.tagline: Elegant split-leather heavy chrome zinc key rings
products.description: A luxury daily companion keychain. Heavy zinc-alloy frame with thick, beautifully stitched split leather straps. Laser engraved or heat embossed logo accent.

products.name: Branded Portable Bluetooth Speakers
products.tagline: Premium fabric-wrapped 5W portable wireless speakers
products.description: Ultra-rich high-fidelity 5W wireless speakers wrap customized with full-color UV branding prints. Includes waterproof IPX5 seals for outdoor active use.

products.name: Slim Custom Power Banks
products.tagline: High capacity 10000mAh metal executive backup chargers
products.description: Slim double port executive charging blocks wrapped in sleek brushed aluminum shells. Laser engrave your branding in pristine illuminated contrasts.

products.name: Luxury Paper Shopping Bags
products.tagline: Premium heavy art card boutique shopping bags
products.description: Turn customers into walking brand advocates with premium matte-laminated retail paper bags. Features padded cotton cords and cardboard reinforced bottom bases.

products.name: Eco Kraft Paper Bags
products.tagline: 100% recyclable organic brown twisted-handle paper bags
products.description: Thick brown organic kraft retail carrier bags with comfortable twisted paper handles. Eco-friendly water-soluble printing ink makes them 100% safe to compost.

products.name: Premium Jute & Burlap Bags
products.tagline: Sturdy organic laminated burlap reusable shopper bags
products.description: Extremely robust reusable shopper bags made with organic raw jute fabrics. Premium lamination lining inside allows easy damp cloth cleaning.

products.name: Custom Cotton Tote Bags
products.tagline: Heavy canvas cotton reusable eco brand shopping totes
products.description: Classic retail canvas cotton grocery tote bags. Long cross-stitched handles fit comfortably over shoulders for seamless heavy carry daily use.

products.name: Printed Nylon Drawstring Bags
products.tagline: Water-resistant lightweight promo backpack drawstring bags
products.description: Comfortable water-resistant polyester string bags. Metal grommets and double stitched corner tabs prevent cord pullout under weight stress.

testimonials.name: Sarah Al-Mansouri
testimonials.title: Creative Director, Lumina Agency
testimonials.quote: Evora delivered beyond our expectations. The foil-stamped business cards were absolutely stunning — our clients noticed immediately.

testimonials.name: James Harrington
testimonials.title: Founder, The Atelier Co.
testimonials.quote: From brief to delivery, the process was seamless. The packaging quality matched our brand's luxury positioning perfectly.

testimonials.name: Rania Khalil
testimonials.title: Head of Marketing, Prestige Group
testimonials.quote: We've used Evora for all our print needs for 3 years. The consistency and quality are unmatched in the region.
